languages.text: "Собираетесь доверить судьбу династии ксеносской игрушке? Это скверная ставка, и от нее разит ересью!"

traits.locale_text: "Собираетесь доверить судьбу династии ксеносской игрушке? Это скверная ставка, и от нее разит ересью!"

languages.text: "You are going to entrust the fate of the dynasty to a xenos toy? That's a terrible bet, and it reeks of heresy!"
languages.original_text: "Собираетесь доверить судьбу династии ксеносской игрушке? Это скверная ставка, и от нее разит ересью!"

traits.locale_text: "You are going to entrust the fate of the dynasty to a xenos toy? That's a terrible bet, and it reeks of heresy!"
"You are going to entrust the fate of the dynasty to a xenos toy? That's a terrible bet, and it reeks of heresy!"
"You are going to entrust the fate of the dynasty to a xenos toy? That's a terrible bet, and it reeks of heresy!"

languages.text: “你打算把王朝的命运托付给一件异形玩具？这真是一场愚蠢的赌局，而且还散发着异端的气息！”
languages.original_text: "You are going to entrust the fate of the dynasty to a xenos toy? That's a terrible bet, and it reeks of heresy!"

traits.locale_text: “你打算把王朝的命运托付给一件异形玩具？这真是一场愚蠢的赌局，而且还散发着异端的气息！”

languages.text: « Vous allez confier le sort de la dynastie à un jouet xénos ? C'est une très mauvaise idée, qui flirte avec l'hérésie ! »
languages.original_text: "You are going to entrust the fate of the dynasty to a xenos toy? That's a terrible bet, and it reeks of heresy!"

traits.locale_text: « Vous allez confier le sort de la dynastie à un jouet xénos ? C'est une très mauvaise idée, qui flirte avec l'hérésie ! »

languages.text: «¿Confiará el destino de la dinastía a un juguete xenos? Es una apuesta nefasta, ¡y apesta a herejía!».
languages.original_text: "You are going to entrust the fate of the dynasty to a xenos toy? That's a terrible bet, and it reeks of heresy!"

traits.locale_text: «¿Confiará el destino de la dinastía a un juguete xenos? Es una apuesta nefasta, ¡y apesta a herejía!».

languages.text: "Hanedanlığın kaderini bir zeno oyuncağına mı emanet edeceksin? Bu korkunç bir kumar. Öyle ki kâfirlik kokuyor!"
languages.original_text: "You are going to entrust the fate of the dynasty to a xenos toy? That's a terrible bet, and it reeks of heresy!"

traits.locale_text: "Hanedanlığın kaderini bir zeno oyuncağına mı emanet edeceksin? Bu korkunç bir kumar. Öyle ki kâfirlik kokuyor!"

languages.text: "Ihr wollt das Schicksal der Dynastie einem Spielzeug der Xenos anvertrauen? Das ist ein furchtbare Entscheidung, die überdies nach Ketzerei riecht."
languages.original_text: "You are going to entrust the fate of the dynasty to a xenos toy? That's a terrible bet, and it reeks of heresy!"

traits.locale_text: "Ihr wollt das Schicksal der Dynastie einem Spielzeug der Xenos anvertrauen? Das ist ein furchtbare Entscheidung, die überdies nach Ketzerei riecht."

languages.text: 「王朝を異種玩具に託すとは、恐ろしい賭けだ。異端の臭いがする！」
languages.original_text: "You are going to entrust the fate of the dynasty to a xenos toy? That's a terrible bet, and it reeks of heresy!"

traits.locale_text: 「王朝を異種玩具に託すとは、恐ろしい賭けだ。異端の臭いがする！」
